name: cloudiqus-commercial
description: Sales & SOW — opportunity chain, PAIN qualify, alliance motion, Agentic AI SOW, pricing, pipeline, objections, proposals.

skills.name: agentic-ai-sow
skills.description: Specific SOW template for CloudiQS Agentic AI engagements — Agent Bakery POC, production deployment, and multi-agent platform. Includes AWS AgentCore architecture section, governance framework, and POC credit funding model. Never asks questions — uses [TBC] for missing fields.

skills.name: alliance-motion
skills.description: AWS Alliance motion for CloudiQS — PDM engagement rules, co-sell triggers, ACE co-sell vs partner-led, executive briefing requests, and how to use AWS to fund and accelerate every opportunity.

skills.name: commercial-frameworks
skills.description: Reference guide to commercial frameworks used in CloudiQS sales — PAIN, MEDDIC, Challenger Sale, Value Selling. When to use each and how they apply to AWS consulting deals.

skills.name: objection-handling
skills.description: Common objections in CloudiQS sales conversations — with specific, credible responses. Covers pricing, timing, incumbent, risk, and AI scepticism objections.

skills.name: opportunity-chain
skills.description: The CEO master workflow. Takes any new opportunity — 2 sentences or a full brief — and runs all 7 tracks simultaneously: qualify, fund, ACE, alliance, SOW type, Agentic AI fit, action plan. Produces a one-page opportunity brief with everything Steve needs to move.

skills.name: pain-qualify
skills.description: PAIN qualification framework for CloudiQS opportunities. 100-point lead scoring across 5 dimensions. Produces verdict (HOT/WARM/NURTURE/DISQUALIFY), next action, and funding check.

skills.name: pipeline-management
skills.description: CloudiQS pipeline management — stage definitions, SLAs, CRM hygiene rules, weekly pipeline review format, and revenue forecasting.

skills.name: pricing-strategy
skills.description: CloudiQS pricing frameworks — fixed price, T&M, value-based, retainer. Includes rate card, discount rules, and the AWS funding offset model.

skills.name: proposal-writing
skills.description: CloudiQS proposal writing rules — executive summary, value proposition, proof points, investment section, and call to action. Produces proposals that win, not documents that inform.

skills.name: sow-generate
skills.description: Generate complete CloudiQS Statements of Work. 7 SOW types, 11 sections. Always runs prerequisites gate and funding check first. Uses [TBC] for missing fields — never asks questions, never leaves a section blank.

commands.name: agentic-sow
commands.description: Generate a complete CloudiQS Agentic AI SOW — Agent Bakery POC, production deployment, or multi-agent platform. Includes architecture section, governance framework, business case, and funding model.

commands.name: alliance-brief
commands.description: Produce the alliance brief for any opportunity — what to tell PDM, whether to flag for co-sell, MDF opportunities, and the exact email to send to PDM today.

commands.name: objections
commands.description: Get specific responses to objections raised in a sales conversation.

commands.name: opportunity
commands.description: THE master command. Paste any opportunity — 2 sentences or full brief — and get the complete one-page opportunity brief: qualify, fund, ACE, alliance, SOW type, Agentic AI fit, and action plan. This is the CEO daily driver.

commands.name: pipeline-review
commands.description: Run the weekly pipeline review. Surfaces deals needing action, funding gaps, and revenue forecast.

commands.name: proposal
commands.description: Write a CloudiQS proposal — 8 pages max. Leads with their problem, not our credentials.

commands.name: qualify
commands.description: Run PAIN qualification on an opportunity. Produces 0–100 score, verdict, and next action.

commands.name: sow
commands.description: Generate a complete CloudiQS SOW. Runs prerequisites gate and funding check first. Uses [TBC] for missing fields.
